News & Events

Training schools, workshops, conferences and scientific highlights from the Met2Adapt doctoral network.

The Met2Adapt webpage is live!

March 05, 2026

Our primary communication platform is up and running!

The Met2Adapt webpage is live!

March 05, 2026

Met2Adapt Kick-off Meeting

February 16, 2026

Consortium-wide meeting to launch the project.

Met2Adapt Kick-off Meeting

February 16, 2026

The MENTOR consortium met for a two-day kick-off meeting to align research plans, present work packages and introduce the doctoral candidates. Sessions included project governance, data management and training plans.

The 1st call for applications is now open!

February 01, 2026

We invite applications for range of doctoral positions.

Read on external site

The 1st call for applications is now open!

February 01, 2026

The first call for applications is now open. This is an exceptional opportunity for highly motivated and outstanding candidates to join an innovative team of researchers engaged in cutting-edge projects that span a wide range of disciplines.

The Met2Adapt Doctoral Network
National Technical University of Athens,
School of Civil Engineering,
Laboratory for Structural Analysis and Aseismic Research,
9 Iroon Polytechneiou st.
NTUA Zografou Campus, Greece, 15780
(Maps, Directions)

Coordinator
Dr. Savvas Triantafyllou, Associate Professor

Met2Adapt is funded by the European Union under the grant agreement No 101227175. Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or the European Research Executive Agency (REA). Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them.
